name: Pico De Gallo - Allan's Mexican Salsa
recipeIngredient: ½ cup finely chopped cilantro leaves
4 large fresh serrano or jalapenos peppers
2 - 4 oz cans diced Fire Roasted Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the tomatoes in a blender and place all but half a cup in a large bowl.
2. In the blender with the remaining half cup of tomatoes, add the fresh peppers and blend into a liquid. Do not add this to the bowl of tomatoes.
3. Mix in the chopped onions, pressed garlic, cilantro, canned jalapenos, salt, and lime juice into the bowl of tomatoes.
4. Slowly add the blended peppers from the blender until it reaches your desired heat level (can get a little hotter after a couple hours).
5. Add additional salt to taste.
